product.title: Turkmenistan Itinerary Guide
product.short_des: Compare 3-day, 5-day, 7-day and 10-day Turkmenistan routes with Ashgabat, Darvaza, Ancient Merv and desert landscapes.

product.title: Darvaza Gas Crater Guide
product.short_des: Learn how to visit Darvaza Gas Crater, when to go, whether to stay overnight and how to include it in your Turkmenistan route.

product.title: Uzbekistan Silk Road Guide
product.short_des: Plan a classic Uzbekistan route through Tashkent, Samarkand, Bukhara and Khiva with practical timing and travel tips.
